Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.vela

Interface VeLaListener

All Superinterfaces:
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
All Known Implementing Classes:
VeLaBaseListener
public interface VeLaListener extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by VeLaParser.
